content.text: Over 100,000 volumes, international journals, digital repos, and fully automated borrowing systems.
Each department is equipped with modern, specialized labs complying with industry standards. Includes our AICTE IDEA lab.
Separate, secure, and fully equipped hostels for boys and girls with high-speed internet and mess facilities.
Facilities for cricket, football, basketball, table tennis, and a fully equipped indoor gymnasium.
Hygienic, affordable, and diverse food options available for students and staff throughout the day.
